AboutUsHome.text1: At AlphaBelle, we understand that excellence has no gender.
AboutUsHome.text2: Natural results, absolute discretion, and personalized protocols tailored to both male and female anatomy.

Home.whatText: From medical weight management and hormonal optimization to Botox, dermal fillers and advanced regenerative therapies — every protocol is tailored to deliver natural, lasting results.
Home.whoText: A space where regenerative medicine and high-end aesthetics converge — built on precision, discretion, and a genuine commitment to your well-being.

AboutUs.heading: Who are we?
AboutUs.title: About Us
AboutUs.subTitle: We have designed a space where regenerative medicine and high-end aesthetics converge to empower the best version of our patients.
AboutUs.text: At AlphaBelle Wellness, we believe that wellness and aesthetic care are for everyone. Our approach seamlessly integrates health, balance, and beauty offering personalized solutions designed to help each individual achieve their best self.
AboutUs.text1: We combine advanced technology with a comprehensive, results-driven approach that goes beyond surface-level treatments. From medical weight loss programs and hormonal optimization to aesthetic services such as Botox, dermal fillers, and advanced skin regeneration therapies, every treatment is tailored to deliver natural, lasting results.
AboutUs.text2: At AlphaBelle Wellness, we don’t just enhance appearance, we help restore confidence, optimize overall health, and elevate quality of life.
AboutUs.textM: At AlphaBelle Wellness, our mission is to redefine wellness and aesthetics through an exclusive, personalized experience grounded in medical excellence. We are dedicated to elevating each individual’s best self through advanced treatments focused on weight loss, hormonal balance, and skin regeneration.
AboutUs.textM1: By combining science, innovation, and a holistic approach, we deliver visible, natural, and long-lasting results creating an environment where every detail is designed to inspire confidence, enhance self-image, and promote authentic, sustainable well-being.
AboutUs.textV: Our vision is to establish AlphaBelle Wellness as a premier destination in modern wellness and aesthetic medicine, recognized for innovation, sophistication, and exceptional results.
AboutUs.textV1: We aspire to build an iconic brand where health, beauty, and high performance exist in perfect harmony setting a new standard in the industry and delivering a transformative experience that goes beyond the conventional.

AboutPage.heroIntro: We have designed a space where regenerative medicine and high-end aesthetics converge to empower the best version of every patient.
AboutPage.storyTitle: Wellness, balance and beauty — for everyone
AboutPage.teamIntro: Every treatment at AlphaBelle is performed by trained medical professionals devoted to safe, natural, and lasting results.
AboutPage.role1desc: Board-certified physician specializing in regenerative and aesthetic medicine, overseeing every protocol.
AboutPage.role2desc: Advanced injector with a refined eye for facial balance and natural-looking enhancement.
AboutPage.role3desc: Dedicated to personalized skin health, IV therapy, and an exceptional patient experience.
AboutPage.credIntro: Your safety is the foundation of everything we do. AlphaBelle operates under strict medical oversight and uses only approved, evidence-based protocols.

Team.m1bio: Dedicated registered nurse with clinical experience in men's and women's health. Possesses a strong understanding of assessment, diagnosis and the management of patients and nurses. Reliable, passionate and accurate nurse with interpersonal skills and the ability to communicate with patients, doctors and family members, looking for an opportunity to work long term with a medical facility.
Team.m2bio: Registered Nurse with a Bachelor of Science in Nursing and nearly five years of medical studies completed in Cuba, giving him advanced knowledge of anatomy, physiology, and pharmacology. Now practicing in primary care, he is recognized for strong clinical assessment, teamwork, and safe, evidence-based, patient-centered care.
Team.m3bio: Founder and administrator overseeing daily operations at AlphaBelle Wellness. He leads the team and ensures every patient receives attentive, high-quality care from start to finish.
Team.m4bio: Laser Professional (Level IV) with certifications in Neurotoxins, Dermal Fillers, Microneedling, and professional skin assessment. She delivers an exclusive, personalized service with the highest quality standards for an exceptional experience at AlphaBelle Wellness.
Team.m5bio: Licensed esthetician in the state of Texas with over 800 hours of advanced clinical training and extensive experience in facial therapies. She stands out for her personalized approach, high hygiene standards, and protocols tailored to each patient for visible, lasting results.
Team.m6role: Advanced Laser Professional · Licensed Laser Hair Removal Specialist
Team.m6bio: Licensed professional in the state of Texas with advanced training in Laser Professional Levels I–IV, specializing in Laser Hair Removal. Committed to safe, personalized treatments and also certified in Dermal Fillers, offering a comprehensive approach to enhance each patient's natural beauty.
Team.m7bio: Certified Nutrition & Fitness Specialist at AlphaBelle Wellness, dedicated to helping clients improve their health, confidence, and overall wellness through personalized nutrition guidance, lifestyle support, and fitness-focused recommendations. She is passionate about helping each client build sustainable habits and feel their best from the inside out.
Team.m8bio: 20 Years of Experience as an ER Doctor

HowWeWork.title: How will we do it?
HowWeWork.text1: To begin, we will coordinate an appointment with you and your family to carry out a detailed diagnosis of the current situation you are facing. Then, we will propose the most suitable solution options for your specific needs.
HowWeWork.text2: Roof replacement, insolation, help you switch electrical suppliers at no cost. Our goal is to offer you customized alternatives that effectively respond to your requirements.

Services.title: Professionals in:
Services.subtitle: Wellness & Aesthetics
Services.texts2: Reserve your appointment and receive a personalized consultation.
Services.pageIntro: At Alphabelle Wellness, we combine medical wellness, aesthetic medicine, and advanced beauty treatments to help our clients look, feel, and perform at their best.
Services.descripcion1: Personalized medical weight loss programs designed to help patients achieve sustainable results through physician-guided therapies and comprehensive wellness support.
Services.descripcion2: Comprehensive hormone evaluation and optimization programs designed to improve energy, vitality, performance, mood, and overall quality of life.
Services.descripcion3: Advanced wellness therapies designed to improve energy production, recovery, immune support, mental clarity, and healthy aging.
Services.descripcion4: Non-surgical aesthetic treatments designed to restore confidence, enhance natural beauty, and support tissue regeneration.
Services.descripcion5: Modern aesthetic procedures designed to improve skin quality, texture, tone, and overall appearance without surgery.
Services.descripcion6: Advanced laser technologies and recovery therapies designed to improve appearance, comfort, and post-treatment healing.

persona1.mensaje: Excellent service and very natural results. The AlphaBelle team exceeded my expectations with impeccable care.

persona2.mensaje: I loved the technology they use. You can really tell the expertise and the attention to detail in every treatment.

persona3.mensaje: A modern and professional space. The results were visible from the first session, highly recommended.

persona4.mensaje: The best aesthetic clinic in town. The staff is very friendly and the facilities are top-notch.

CTA.title: Do you want to know more about our services?
CTA.text: We are ready to provide you with the best advice for your business or home.

Footer.title: More information
Footer.textBold: Not sure which treatment is ideal for you?
Footer.text: Before any procedure, our team performs a personalized assessment to understand your skin's unique needs and your aesthetic goals.

FaqPage.heroIntro: Everything you need to know about visiting AlphaBelle Wellness in Katy, TX.

items.a: We're at 2750 FM 1463 Suite 250, Katy, TX 77494.
Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM. We're closed on weekends.
Weight loss and metabolic optimization, hormone therapy, wellness and NAD+ injections, aesthetic injectables (Botox, fillers, PRP), advanced skin treatments, and laser and body recovery.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Book online through our booking page, or call us at (281) 505-1331.
Yes. AlphaBelle is a physician-led practice, so every treatment is performed by trained medical professionals.

items.q: Do you offer both wellness and aesthetic treatments?
items.a: Yes — regenerative medicine and high-end aesthetics live under one roof, so you can care for how you feel and how you look in one place.

items.q: I'm not sure which treatment is right for me. What should I do?
items.a: Start with a personalized consultation. Our team assesses your needs and goals, then recommends the right plan for you.

items.q: Do you offer treatments for both men and women?
items.a: Yes. Our wellness and hormone programs are tailored for both men's and women's health, alongside aesthetic treatments for everyone.
